---
title: "BioAI & AI for Biology"
subtitle: "Machine learning, foundation models, and intelligent systems for biology"
description: "BioMIND research on AI for biology: machine learning, bioinformatics, AI-guided drug discovery, molecular intelligence, omics, and biological sequence modeling."
---

## Overview

BioMIND develops AI methods for **biological discovery, biomedical modeling, and scientific understanding**. This area includes machine learning for biological data, bioinformatics, AI-guided drug discovery, molecular intelligence, omics, biological sequence modeling, and AI4Science workflows.

## Key Questions

- How can AI systems learn useful representations of biological sequences, molecules, and biological networks?
- How can machine learning accelerate biological discovery and therapeutic design?
- How can BioAI systems remain interpretable, trustworthy, and scientifically grounded?
- How can biological data, molecular structure, and domain knowledge be integrated into modern AI models?

## Methods and themes

::: {.bm-grid .bm-grid-2}

::: {.bm-card}
### Representation learning for biology
Self-supervised pretraining on biological sequences, structures, and multi-omics data; transfer to downstream tasks.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Bioinformatics and biomedical AI
Statistical learning and ML methods for genomic, proteomic, and biomedical datasets.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### AI-guided discovery
Active learning, design loops, and AI-assisted hypothesis generation for biology and therapeutics.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Trustworthy BioAI
Interpretability, calibration, fairness, and rigorous evaluation in biological ML.
:::

:::

## Example projects

- Interpretable graph-based deep learning for **drug-target interaction prediction** ([AttentionSiteDTI](../publications/index.qmd))
- **Bias-aware** drug-target interaction prediction with ensemble-balanced learning ([UnbiasedDTI](../publications/index.qmd))
- **Binding-site augmented** drug-target affinity modeling for drug repurposing ([BindingSite-AugmentedDTA](../publications/index.qmd))
- mRNA and biological-sequence **foundation models** for downstream biological tasks

## Related faculty

- [Ozlem Ozmen Garibay](../people/faculty.qmd#ozlem-ozmen-garibay) — Human-CAIR / MoML
- [Niloofar Yousefi](../people/faculty.qmd#niloofar-yousefi) — AI-AIR
- [Ivan I. Garibay](../people/faculty.qmd#ivan-i-garibay) — CASL

## Representative publications

See the [Publications](../publications/index.qmd) page for the full record; selected BioAI work is highlighted under *Selected Publications* and *BioAI & Molecular Machine Learning*.
